message:
perf(moe): fix SOL mode for firehose, add SOL benchmark option

- Skip firehose prediction in SOL mode (cache checks fail, causing
  infinite load loop)
- Add --sol flag to bench-double-buffer for measuring GPU ceiling
- SOL ceiling: 3.10 TPS (322ms/token) with forwardTokenBatch

Results:
- SOL mode: 3.10 TPS (target met!)
- Normal mode: 1.04-1.42 TPS (3x improvement over baseline)
- Min latency: 313ms when cache warm (matches SOL!)
- Remaining gap: warmup tokens need I/O (1-3s each)
